name: dinekit
description: DineKit – restaurant menus, UK allergen support and QR table cards for WordPress.
author: Web Level Up

scripts.lint:php: wp-env run cli --env-cwd=/var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/dinekit bash -c "find . -name '*.php' -not -path './node_modules/*' -not -path './vendor/*' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 php -l"
